publishedAbstract: * Ceph/ODF is in a Health State * Most workloads are unaffected * Pods are in CrashLoopBackOff, failing to start due to "read-only file system" **Related Articles:** [Unable to Mount NFS/CephFS Volumes- "Mounting arguments:-t nfs-o nolabel, mount failed: exit status 32" w/ "ContainerCreating"- OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF)](https://access.redhat.com/solutions/7137874) [NooBaa Resources Pick Up Custom SCC Interfering with Intended Functionality of Multicloud Object Gateway (MCG)](https://access.redhat.com/solutions/7101356) [Security Context Constraint Issues Causing Rook-Ceph Pod Failures After ODF Upgrade](https://access.redhat.com/solutions/7096511)
publishedTitle: OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF) Ceph Volumes Fail to Mount in Read/Write - "relabel failed lsetxattr /var/lib/kubelet/pods/xx/volumes/kubernetes.io~csi/pvc-xx/mount/<file-name>: read-only file system"
